allow: Bash(adb -s b5c7dca40507 shell "dumpsys activity activities | grep -i multi_vendor")

Bash(ls ~/.local/bin/supabase /usr/local/bin/supabase ~/bin/supabase 2>/dev/null; npx --no-install supabase --version 2>/dev/null; echo "---brew/go---"; ls ~/go/bin/supabase 2>/dev/null; find ~ -maxdepth 3 -name "supabase" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3)
Bash(psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/postgres" -c "select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_name='vendors' and column_name='image_url';")
Bash(sed -i -e '3s/ and a Google Maps API key\\./\\./' -e '17,18d' .env)
Bash(echo "grep exit: $? \(1 = key meta-data gone from merged manifest\)")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54322 -U postgres -d postgres -tc "select schemaname, tablename from pg_publication_tables where pubname='supabase_realtime';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54322 -U postgres -d postgres -tc "select schemaname||'.'||tablename from pg_publication_tables where pubname='supabase_realtime';")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/postgres -c "select id, status, total_cents, created_at from public.orders where status not in \('delivered','cancelled','awaiting_payment','paid'\) order by created_at desc limit 10;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/postgres -c "select status, count\(*\) from public.orders group by 1;" -c "select id, status, created_at from public.orders where status in \('in_transit','picked_up','out_for_delivery'\) order by created_at desc limit 5;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:55432/postgres -c "select o.id, o.status, o.created_at, u.email from public.orders o join public.users u on u.id=o.customer_id where o.status='in_transit';" -c "select count\(*\), max\(recorded_at\) from public.location_pings;")
